'''âd-l-f-p''' ('''kadalfepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:euphemise|euphemise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-l-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euphemise|euphemise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-l-f-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadalfepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidalfepoko|thidalfepoko]] || [[word:jidalfepoko|jidalfepoko]] || [[word:shidalfepoko|shidalfepoko]] || [[word:kidalfepoko|kidalfepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudalfepoko|thuthudalfepoko]] || [[word:jujudalfepoko|jujudalfepoko]] || [[word:shushudalfepoko|shushudalfepoko]] || [[word:kukudalfepoko|kukudalfepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudalfepoko|thudalfepoko]] || [[word:judalfepoko|judalfepoko]] || [[word:shudalfepoko|shudalfepoko]] || [[word:kudalfepoko|kudalfepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudalfepoko|thudalfepoko]] || [[word:judalfepoko|judalfepoko]] || [[word:shudalfepoko|shudalfepoko]] || [[word:kudalfepoko|kudalfepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedalfepoko|thedalfepoko]] || [[word:jedalfepoko|jedalfepoko]] || [[word:shedalfepoko|shedalfepoko]] || [[word:kedalfepoko|kedalfepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodalfepoko|thothodalfepoko]] || [[word:jojodalfepoko|jojodalfepoko]] || [[word:shoshodalfepoko|shoshodalfepoko]] || [[word:kokodalfepoko|kokodalfepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodalfepoko|thodalfepoko]] || [[word:jodalfepoko|jodalfepoko]] || [[word:shodalfepoko|shodalfepoko]] || [[word:kodalfepoko|kodalfepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodalfepoko|thodalfepoko]] || [[word:jodalfepoko|jodalfepoko]] || [[word:shodalfepoko|shodalfepoko]] || [[word:kodalfepoko|kodalfepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdalfepoko|thĂŠdalfepoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdalfepoko|jĂŠdalfepoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdalfepoko|shĂŠdalfepoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdalfepoko|kĂŠdalfepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadalfepoko|thathadalfepoko]] || [[word:jajadalfepoko|jajadalfepoko]] || [[word:shashadalfepoko|shashadalfepoko]] || [[word:kakadalfepoko|kakadalfepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadalfepoko|thadalfepoko]] || [[word:jadalfepoko|jadalfepoko]] || [[word:shadalfepoko|shadalfepoko]] || [[word:kadalfepoko|kadalfepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadalfepoko|thadalfepoko]] || [[word:jadalfepoko|jadalfepoko]] || [[word:shadalfepoko|shadalfepoko]] || [[word:kadalfepoko|kadalfepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
